      @Test @DisplayName("addCustomer: Customer with blank ID should be ignored") void testAddCustomer_customerWithBlankId_shouldBeIgnored()

      @Test @DisplayName("addCustomer: Multiple distinct customers should all be added") void testAddCustomer_multipleDistinctCustomers_shouldAllBeAdded()

    • testAddCustomer_duplicateId_shouldBeAdded

      @Test @DisplayName("addCustomer: Customer with duplicate ID should also be added") void testAddCustomer_duplicateId_shouldBeAdded()

    • testRemoveCustomer_existingId_shouldRemoveAndReturnTrue

      @Test @DisplayName("removeCustomer: Existing ID should remove customer and return true") void testRemoveCustomer_existingId_shouldRemoveAndReturnTrue()

    • testRemoveCustomer_nonExistentId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse

      @Test @DisplayName("removeCustomer: Non-existent ID should do nothing and return false") void testRemoveCustomer_nonExistentId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse()

    • testRemoveCustomer_nullId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse

      @Test @DisplayName("removeCustomer: Null ID should do nothing and return false") void testRemoveCustomer_nullId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse()

    • testRemoveCustomer_blankId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse

      @Test @DisplayName("removeCustomer: Blank ID should do nothing and return false") void testRemoveCustomer_blankId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse()
